response.justification: Bogdan brings exceptional technical depth and a demonstrated passion for teaching and software craftsmanship, but lacks the explicit people management experience required for this mid-to-senior management role. While his teaching workshops and mentoring indicate potential for team development, there's no evidence of formal team leadership, performance management, or organizational development—all critical for this full-time people-leadership position. He would need significant onboarding on the people management side despite being technically overqualified.
strengths: 20 years of software development with deep expertise across platforms (web, mobile, embedded); demonstrates the technical credibility needed for a technical management role
Proven passion for knowledge sharing and team development through organizing refactoring dojos, code katas, and teaching multiple workshops on testing and craftsmanship practices
Strong emphasis on code quality, testing, and best practices (TDD, CI/CD, code review) aligns well with engineering productivity focus
concerns: No evidence of formal people management experience (hiring, performance evaluation, team development, one-on-ones), which is a minimum requirement for this level
Limited depth in developer tools and build systems—experience with MCP code generators and CI/CD infrastructure is present but not a primary focus of career
Mobile platform expertise limited to 2015-2016 roles; limited evidence of large-scale platform ecosystem management needed for the major mobile platform ecosystem mentioned
